scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && AFTERGLOW_ALLOW_INSECURE=1 uv run python -m pytest tests/ -v --ignore=tests/integration
scripts.test:backend:integration: cd backend && AFTERGLOW_ALLOW_INSECURE=1 uv run python -m pytest tests/integration -v
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:backend:integration && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:backend:fix: cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.js && git add backend/pyproject.toml backend/uv.lock frontend/package.json
